description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Run Tests that runs on every push to the master branch and on pull requests. Use a single ubuntu-latest job with a matrix strategy to test multiple Python versions (3.10, 3.11, 3.12, 3.13). For each version, check out the repository, set up Python with pip caching, upgrade pip, install tox and tox-gh-actions, and run tests with tox.
